title: tateishia bolsteri
side_effects: Tateishia bolsteri can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, due to its high concentration of toxic compounds. Ingesting large quantities of the plant can lead to more severe symptoms, including headaches, dizziness, and even seizures in rare cases. Prolonged exposure to the plant's chemicals can also cause damage to the liver and kidneys, resulting in long-term health issues. Furthermore, improper handling of the plant can cause skin irritation and allergic reactions in sensitive individuals.
